title: draba nivalis
intro: Draba nivalis, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass or Arctic Whitlow Grass, is a low-growing, perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family, commonly found in the Arctic and subalpine regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of isothiocyanates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Draba nivalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Draba nivalis can be prepared in various forms, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
